title: Content Module Schema
description: Canonical schema for formalized story content modules (e.g., God of Carnage)

module_id.description: Unique identifier for the content module (e.g., 'god_of_carnage')

contract_version.description: Version of the MVP contract this module adheres to

relationships.description: Relationship axes and dynamics between characters

triggers.description: Recognized trigger types for this module

endings.description: Valid end states and flip conditions
